actionText: INT. OLD MAN'S BEDCHAMBER - NIGHT. also on screen: Character_OfficerHale <IMAGE_2>, Character_OfficerBriggs <IMAGE_1>, Character_Officer_Reynolds <IMAGE_4>. He talks on-too freely. The officers smile, polite. The sound clarifies: low, dull, quick-a watch in cotton. From under the floorboards. From under his chair. THE NARRATOR gasps for breath. The officers do not react. They did not hear. Character_The_Narrator <IMAGE_5> still wears loose white cotton nightshirt, barefoot Camera directive: Medium shot tilts from polite smiling officers down to floorboards under Narrator's chair then back to his gasp. Performance: Acting intensity 8/10: Gasping open mouth and bulging eyes talking too freely Optics: f/1.4 shallow depth of field Color grading: Kodak Vision3 500T 5219 film stock, deep charcoal shadows, sickly cool-blue undertones, dim warm amber highlights Character_OfficerReynolds <IMAGE_3> is on screen.

INT. OLD MAN'S BEDCHAMBER - NIGHT. A thin ringing enters THE NARRATOR's face. He pales. Touches his temple.
